title: Patriarch Ilia II, a Spiritual Symbol of Stability in Georgia, Dies at 93
summary_full: The longest-serving leader in the history of the Georgian Orthodox Church, he helped guide his country in its transition from Soviet repression to modern statehood.
summary_public: The longest-serving leader in the history of the Georgian Orthodox Church, he helped guide his country in its transition from Soviet repression to modern statehood.

GE.label: positive
GE.evidence: Spiritual Symbol of Stability in Georgia
